founders remember.

Where builders live, work, and grow — together.

Scottsdale, AZ June 7–9, 2026 7th Edition 12–15 Founders

The MatCap Founder House is a live-in retreat where early-stage founders spend time working side-by-side, getting feedback, building friendships, and attending curated events. This is our 7th edition — and the community keeps getting stronger. Resident founders are joined by invited guests throughout the week, capping off with a community event open to the broader Arizona startup ecosystem.

Your brand gets in front of some of the most talented, ambitious founders in the country — before they close their next round.

Past residents have been backed by:  Hustle Fund  ·  Outlander VC  ·  Untapped Capital  ·  Draper Associates  ·  Tucker Seed Fund  ·  Copper Sky Capital  ·  Monsoon Venture Fund  ·  PHX Ventures  ·  and many more — you get in front of them before they raise. Every founder in the house is a MatCap portfolio company.
What sponsors receive
01
Direct founder access
Meet and build relationships with pre-raise founders before they close their rounds.
02
Brand placement
Logo visibility at the house, the community event, and across all recap content.
03
Social amplification
Shoutouts to the MatCap audience of founders, investors, and operators across social.
Our reach

Mat Sherman's audience is made up of founders, investors, and operators actively building in the startup ecosystem. 22,000 followers on LinkedIn. 15,000 on X. Sponsorship shoutouts go directly to the people most likely to care about what you're building.

What is MatCap

MatCap is building an access layer for early-stage founders who are top-decile operators but don't have the standard credentials that make fundraising a lower lift. The founders we back are exceptional — they just haven't had the right doors opened yet. That's what we do.

The house

This is where House VII happens.

A premium Scottsdale property booked exclusively for this retreat. Your brand lives here for two days — in the rooms, at the meals, and in front of every founder who walks through the door.
